title: Cobblemon Northala Region
description: Explore the Northala Region! A growing collection of original Fakemon designed for Cobblemon, featuring unique starters, a pseudo-legendary line, and more.
body:
Embark on a new adventure with original Fakemon brought to life in Cobblemon!

The Northala Region brings a roster of unique, handcrafted Fakemon into your Minecraft world through Cobblemon — each with custom models and animations. Whether you're building a team or just love discovering new creatures, Northala adds a fresh layer to your Cobblemon experience.

![Northala Starter Pokemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56edeb5499c339642f9e471e99e8629b7ae48db1_0.webp)


📦 Installation
- Download the file from the files tab — it contains both the datapack and the resource pack.
- Place the Northala datapack (.zip)  in your world's datapacks folder.
- Place the Northala datapack (.zip)  in your resourcepacks folder.
  - use the same file for both folders
- Load up your world and start discovering the Northala Region!

⚠️ Requires Cobblemon to be installed.

_______________________________________________________________________________

🎮 Custom Starter Set (Optional)

Want the Northala starters to appear on your starter selection screen?

- Extract the "starter screen" folder from the .zip file. Inside you'll find main.json and starters.json.
- Move both files to .minecraft/config/cobblemon/ — replace the existing files with the new ones.
- Enjoy your new starters!

⚠️ Note:

If you're using other addons that also has custom starters, you'll need to manually edit starters.json to combine them.

_______________________________________________________________________________

📜 Usage Guidelines

✅ You may:

- Include this pack in a modpack (private or public) with credits
- Use the pack on your server for personal or community play.
- Create videos, streams, or other content featuring the Northala Region — just credit the project!

❌ You may not:

- Use any of this content for profit. This includes but is not limited to:
- Server-exclusive skins, variants, or reskins of Northala Fakemon
- Paywalling Fakemon behind loot crates, keys, donation tiers, or any form of gambling mechanic

- Redistribute this pack anywhere other than Modrinth and CurseForge — these are the only official download sources.
- Claim any of the designs, art, or concepts as your own.
- Use my content for generative AI training or output.
- Create offensive or hateful content using my project or designs.

If you're unsure about something, just ask! Reach out on Discord or Instagram and I'm happy to clarify.
_______________________________________________________________________________

🌐 Explore More
- 📸 [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/hintrox/) — See all Fakemon designs and art
- 🌍 [Northala Website](https://sites.google.com/view/northalaregion/pokedex) — Browse the interactive Pokédex & more, find all information you need!
- 📥 Also available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/cobblemon-northala-fakemon-pack)
_______________________________________________________________________________

🤝 Want to Contribute?

This is a big project and I'm always looking for help! I currently depend on commissioning others for models and animations. If you're a modeler or animator who'd like to join the project, feel free to reach out on Discord or Instagram — I'd love to collaborate.
_______________________________________________________________________________

💬 Feedback & Support

Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Drop a comment or reach out on Discord. Your feedback helps shape the Northala Region!

You can also follow the project on the official cobblemon disord, under the fakemon-design tab
[Discord Page](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1357891496522551367)
